arts.ttl: Bellamy run continues and Jordan James stakes Skopje claim – talking points
arts.sum: Wales opened their World Cup qualifying campaign with a 3-1 home victory over Kazakhstan on Saturday.

arts.ttl: The lost passport that kick-started Wales' epic journey
arts.sum: As Wales return to North Macedonia, players, coaches and journalists look back at their previous headline grabbing visit to Skopje.

arts.ttl: 'Mr Calm' Bellamy looks to Skopje after opening World Cup qualifying win
arts.sum: Wales captain Ben Davies says boss Craig Bellamy was "Mr Calm" after his side made hard work of their opening World Cup qualifier to beat Kazakhstan.
